items.title: The Daily Catch-Up: Your essential round-up of today’s biggest stories
items.summary: XLB brief: a timely india item from Indian Express, selected from the current source feed for quick context and source-first reading.

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Hits Bridges and a Port in Country’s South, Iranian Media says
items.summary: The U.S. military’s Central Command said the latest round of attacks had “hit dozens of Iranian military targets” but made no mention of civilian infrastructure.

items.title: NEET-UG: Over 2.7 lakh candidates skipped re-test, highest absentee count ever
items.summary: For the re-examination, 19,99,895 candidates appeared compared to 22.05 lakh candidates who had taken the original NEET-UG examination
